findings.description: R3 fix confirmed correct: caption now reads '損益分岐点' (岐) matching the image. Original bug '損益分歧点' (歧) is gone.
Section heading '01-07 損益分岐点' visible at top-right of page is not represented as a section entity in the release JSON.
Learning tip callout box ('損益分岐点の求め方を理解することが大切！') with explanatory body text visible on page is not captured in any entity.

Calculation walkthrough text (equations (1)-(4) and conclusion paragraph '販売個数が2,500個で、売上高が750,000円') is present on the page but not represented. These are body/prose content; omission is consistent with figure-only representation of diagram pages but reduces coverage.

reviewer_notes: The R3 jp char fix (歧→岐) is confirmed correct in the fixed file. The sole entity is the break-even figure with accurate caption and translations. However, the page contains three additional visually distinct content blocks (section header, calculation text, learning tip callout) that are absent from the release — these are pre-existing omissions, not introduced by the fix, and reduce overall page coverage to ~30% of visible content. No high-severity findings; two med-severity missing_visual findings trigger WARN.
